title: Stylish Camels!
description: Travel in style! Camel saddle appears as a elegant red carpet. Camel Husk has a ripped, post-apo rags 🐫
body:
Wanna travel like a king?
This texture pack makes the camel saddle texture to be more _elegant_. Instead of the regular saddle now camels will wear nice red carpets with golden decorations.
This pack **_does not_** require optifine

_It's my first pack, hope you'll enjoy it!_
